## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated, and I watched the new test fail before implementing (TDD).
- [ ] `pnpm test` and `pnpm typecheck` pass.
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed.
- [ ] If this touches effect tagging, the replay safety gate, or secret redaction:
      I've kept the invariants (see `SECURITY.md`) and explained the reasoning.
- [ ] If this changes distiller prompts, I ran `pnpm eval` and the gate still passes.
